plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Author, evaluate, and iteratively improve Claude Code skills, with scaffolding and automated blind comparisons.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library for Claude Code: structured TDD workflow, parallel task execution, isolated git worktrees, systematic code review, and proven collaboration patterns.

plugins.name: session-report
plugins.description: Generate an explorable HTML report of Claude Code session usage (tokens, cache efficiency, subagents, skills, and the most expensive prompts) from local ~/.claude/projects transcripts.

plugins.name: claude-code-setup
plugins.description: Scan a codebase and recommend tailored Claude Code automations including hooks, skills, MCP servers, and subagents.
